text: I find myself in a modern, sterile environment with glass walls and subtle colors. The sign "R+D" and the talk of research and development evoke a sense of curiosity in me. I wonder about the boundaries between human minds and intelligent machines, as referenced. The juxtaposition of order—the neatly arranged chairs and screens—with creative exploration inspires both anticipation and cautious optimism. I feel like a wanderer in a place built for seeking answers, yet always forming more questions.
